summary: A rectangular single-story bunker-style building with a gable roof, elevated on a concrete foundation platform. The structure features brick upper walls, sandstone middle section with barred windows, and dark stone base layer. The building is surrounded by a white concrete perimeter foundation and sits within a dirt courtyard.
rebuild_hints: Build concrete foundation platform 1-2 blocks thick surrounding the structure
Layer base with dark stonebrick (1-2 blocks high)
Build sandstone walls for middle section (2-3 blocks high)
Add barred windows evenly spaced across long sides (approximately 6 windows total)
Top with brick walls (1 block high)
Construct gable roof using brick blocks sloping to center peak
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the length axis
Surround with dirt courtyard and grass perimeter
uncertainties: Exact interior height and floor count not visible
Precise window bar material (appears to be dark wood or iron bars)
Whether structure has interior floors or is single open space
Exact dimensions in blocks - estimate based on visual proportions
Roof peak height relative to walls
